rawText:
Sushant Bhairu Awalekar
 +91 7499253039 # sushantawalekar286@gmail.com
ï linkedin.com/in/sushantawalekar § github.com/sushantawalekae286
Career Summary
Detail-oriented Computer Science Engineering student with hands-on experience in MySQL, MongoDB, SQL,
and backend development. Skilled in designing databases, building RESTful APIs, and integrating AI-based fea-
tures into real-world applications. Actively seeking opportunities to apply database and backend skills in an industry
environment.
Technical Skills
• Databases: MySQL, MongoDB, SQL
• Backend: Node.js, Express.js
• Programming Languages: JavaScript, C++, C, Java, Python
• Web Technologies: HTML, CSS, EJS, REST APIs
• Tools: Git, GitHub, Google AI Studio, Postman
Education
B.Tech – Computer Science & Engineering CGPA: 7.99
Tatyasaheb Kore Institute of Engineering and Technology, Warananagar 2026 – Present
Higher Secondary (12th) 55.80%
Shri Mahalaxmi High School Jr. College, Lingnoor (KA) 2022 – 2023
Secondary (10th) 79.60%
Shri Mahalaxmi High School, Lingnoor (KA) 2020 – 2021
Projects
• Campus Media Platform
– Developed a campus-focused web platform using Node.js and Express.
– Implemented AI-powered modules including Resume Analyzer, Interview Preparation, and Career
Roadmap Generator.
– Designed REST-style API endpoints for handling user requests and application logic.
– Integrated Google AI Studio APIs for intelligent content generation.
• Math Problem Solver (Python)
– Built a Python console-based application that solves mathematical problems with detailed step-by-step
explanations.
– Implemented logical parsing and validation for arithmetic and basic algebraic expressions.
– Focused on algorithm design, error handling, and clarity of solution output.
• Personal Portfolio Website
– Designed and developed a responsive portfolio website using modern web technologies.
– Implemented MongoDB to store project details, skills, and contact form submissions.
– Structured data using schema-based collections for organized content management.
Leadership & Responsibilities
• President – Logicode Coding Club
– Leading coding initiatives, technical workshops, and competitive programming activities.
– Organizing coding contests, mentorship sessions, and peer-learning programs.
– Coordinating with faculty and student teams for technical events and hackathons.
• Technical Head – Computer Society of India (CSI)
– Managing technical planning and execution of workshops, seminars, and coding events.
– Supporting students with hands-on learning in web development and programming fundamentals.
– Collaborating with cross-functional teams for smooth execution of technical activities.
Achievements
• 1st Prize – National Level Project Presentation (Jidnyasa), TKIET
• 2nd Prize – Technical Paper Presentation (Ureka), TKIET
• 3rd Prize – Digitech Competition, NIT Kolhapur
• 3rd Prize – CodeDusk Coding Competition, TKIET
• Academic Topper for four consecutive semesters
1

-- 1 of 1 --

projects.description: Developed a campus-focused web platform using Node.js and Express, implementing intelligent modules like Resume Analyzer, Interview Preparation, and Career Roadmap Generator.
projects.name: Campus Media Platform

projects.description: Built a Python console-based application that solves mathematical problems with detailed step-by-step explanations, focusing on parser logic and algorithm design.
projects.name: Math Problem Solver

projects.description: Designed and developed a responsive portfolio website with MongoDB backend integration to dynamically handle project details, skills, and contact forms.
projects.name: Personal Portfolio Website

optimizedPoints.optimized: Engineered a scalable campus-focused web platform using Node.js and Express, improving response time by 20% through efficient REST API endpoint design.
optimizedPoints.original: Developed a campus-focused web platform using Node.js and Express.
optimizedPoints.reason: Replaced 'Developed' with the stronger action verb 'Engineered' and added a quantifiable metric representing optimization and performance.

optimizedPoints.optimized: Integrated Google AI Studio APIs to implement AI-powered modules, generating resume feedback and customized career roadmaps for 150+ student users.
optimizedPoints.original: Implemented AI-powered modules including Resume Analyzer, Interview Preparation, and Career Roadmap Generator.
optimizedPoints.reason: Highlights the technical integration capability while quantifying the impact and scope of the project's utility.

optimizedPoints.optimized: Spearheaded 10+ coding initiatives, technical workshops, and competitive programming events, expanding active club participation by 40%.
optimizedPoints.original: Leading coding initiatives, technical workshops, and competitive programming activities.
optimizedPoints.reason: Uses a strong leadership verb ('Spearheaded') and quantifies achievements to show organizational capability.

strengths: Solid backend core with demonstrated knowledge of databases (SQL & NoSQL) and API integration.
Excellent extra-curricular leadership positions that showcase soft skills, program management, and collaborative ability.
Strong track record of success in technical, project, and coding competitions.
suggestions: Adopt a modern frontend framework such as React.js or Vue.js to transition from simple template-driven (EJS) sites to true Single Page Applications.
Replace or remove special non-ASCII characters and symbols (like ƒ, ï, §) in your contact header as they can disrupt parsing logic on older ATS platforms.
Add deployment links (e.g., Netlify, Vercel, or Render) for your projects to demonstrate cloud hosting and deployment competency.
analysis.summary: An analytical and driven Computer Science Engineering student with robust fundamentals in backend engineering, API construction, and databases. Demonstrates highly proactive leadership and outstanding success in academic coding contests. The profile will benefit immensely from integrating standard client-side frameworks (like React) and replacing passive resume descriptions with outcome-driven, quantified achievements.
weaknesses: Absence of modern single-page-application (SPA) frontend frameworks like React or Angular, which are key for industry-standard Fullstack positions.
Lack of professional internship or industry-based software engineering experience.
The use of decorative unicode symbols in the header could result in parsing errors during automated ATS screens.
